case_title: KIM, AMY NAYOUNG vs. SARABIA, NINA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, AMY NAYOUNG AS TO DEFENDANT SARABIA, NINA BALASABAS, JOSEPH DOES 1 TO 25 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-18-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-20-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-29-1995
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR KRENTSA, DONALD EDWARD AS ATTORNEY FOR KIM, AMY NAYOUNG

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER EXTENDING TIME TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON COMPLAINT, ORDER GRANTED BY JUDGE WICK, STATUS CONFERENCE REMAINS SCHEDULED FOR 18/JAN/96 2PM #4 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, AMY NAYOUNG TIME TO FILE EXTENDED UNTIL NOV-30-1995
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-20-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-20-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR PLAINTIFF: $250.00 SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED BUT STAYED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO APPEAR OR COURT MAY DISMISS CASE. HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, AMY NAYOUNG HEARING SET FOR DEC-05-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF DEC-05-1995, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE ORDER.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-18-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-18-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR FEB-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
